summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DocuSign integration in Terre de Beauce ERP. All DocuSign features working correctly including status endpoint, auth URL generation, and frontend banner display. All existing ERP functionality remains intact.
passed_tests: DocuSign status endpoint returns configured=true (API keys properly set)
DocuSign status endpoint returns authenticated=false initially (correct behavior)
DocuSign auth URL endpoint generates valid OAuth URL with correct parameters
DocuSign connection banner displays correctly on Factures page when not authenticated
DocuSign connect button is present and properly styled
All existing ERP endpoints still functional (12/12 backend endpoints working)
Navigation between all pages working correctly (Dashboard, Flotte, Chauffeurs, Clients, Chantiers, Pointages, Factures)
Factures page functionality intact (search, filters, generate button)
Backend API comprehensive testing - 12/12 DocuSign integration tests passed (100% success rate)
Frontend DocuSign banner integration working perfectly
